app.title: Genshin Teams Tracker
hoyolab.profile_busy: The HoYoLAB profile is busy. If the authorization browser is open, close it. The app will check login again after it closes.
hoyolab.not_logged_in: HoYoLAB login was not found. Authorize and close the browser window.
hoyolab.login_browser_open: The HoYoLAB browser is open. Log in, confirm that the account is visible, then close the browser.
hoyolab.authorize_instruction:
A separate HoYoLAB browser window will open. Log in, confirm that the page shows your profile, then close the browser and return to the app.

If you already have a saved offline profile, you can load it from Profile... without HoYoLAB authorization.
hoyolab.close_browser_before_switch: Close the current HoYoLAB browser window before changing account.
hoyolab.reset_failed: Could not reset profile or clear HoYoLAB data: {error}
hoyolab.auth_not_found: HoYoLAB authorization was not found. Please authorize first and check that the HoYoLAB page shows your account before closing the browser.
hoyolab.import_failed: HoYoLAB import did not finish. Check authorization and the console log.
loader.notice:
Please do not switch to other windows or place other apps above the browser until the import finishes.
During import, the app opens HoYoLAB, saves the image, and collects data automatically.
Switching windows or clicking during the process can interrupt the export.
profile.close_import_before_switch: Wait for the import to finish before signing out of profile.
profile.switch_export_warning: The current local profile data will be deleted. Before signing out, you can save it as an offline file and restore it later without importing from HoYoLAB again.
main.clear_finished: Current characters, weapons, HoYoLAB JSON, and debug files were cleared.
drag.delete_outside_assets: Only files from the assets folder can be deleted!
